reverse_geocoded.formatted_address: Urb. Royal Beach, 15, 29649 Mijas, Málaga, Spain

details.description: Sunny Mediterranean beach scene on the Costa del Sol. A sandy urban beach curves along the shoreline with small waves and yellow buoys marking the swimming area. Many beachgoers relax under colorful umbrellas. In the midground a small palm-lined headland projects into the sea, edged by a white fence/railing. Behind it stand low-rise seafront apartment blocks in a typical Andalusian Mediterranean style: whitewashed stucco, terracotta-tile roofs, arched ground-floor openings and balconies. In the foreground is a wooden coastal boardwalk/railing and rope-post fencing running above the sand. The light is bright midday with a clear blue sky.

details.description: A sunny Mediterranean beach scene along the Calahonda coast. The foreground shows a sandy beach with people sunbathing and swimming, colorful umbrellas, and a low wooden railing with dune grasses along a boardwalk. To the left, a row of white Mediterranean-style apartment buildings with terracotta-tile roofs and arched ground-floor walkways line the beachfront, complemented by a line of tall palm trees. The calm blue sea stretches to the horizon under a clear blue sky. The overall vibe is a resort area in Mijas Costa, Spain, with a developed promenade and beachfront amenities.

details.description: A sunny, daytime view of the coastline at Playa de Calahonda in Mijas Costa, Spain, looking east. To the left, a series of white, multi-story resort buildings with terracotta tiled roofs and balconies—typical of Andalusian coastal architecture—overlook the beach. These buildings are likely part of the Macdonald Leila Playa Resort or the adjacent Urbanización Royal Beach. A raised wooden boardwalk, known as the Senda Litoral de Mijas, runs along the edge of the property line, separating the resort grounds from the sandy beach. In the foreground, a wooden post-and-rope fence demarcates a protected area of coastal vegetation or dunes. The beach is comprised of greyish-golden sand and is populated with numerous beachgoers, sunbathers, and colorful umbrellas. To the right, the Mediterranean Sea is calm and deep blue, with a few yellow marker buoys visible in the water. The sky is a clear, cloudless blue.

details.description: A sunny beach scene on the Costa del Sol, featuring a wide sandy shore populated with beachgoers, colorful umbrellas, and sun loungers. To the left, a cluster of white Mediterranean-style apartment buildings with terracotta tiled roofs and balconies overlooks the beach. A wooden boardwalk, part of a coastal path, runs along the edge of the beach, separated from the sand by a low wooden fence and sparse coastal vegetation. The deep blue Mediterranean Sea meets the shore with gentle white waves under a clear, bright blue sky. Palm trees are scattered near the buildings and along the coastline.

details.description: Sunny coastal scene on Spain’s Costa del Sol. The photo looks along a gently curving sandy beach with light surf and yellow swim buoys. Many beachgoers relax under colorful umbrellas or wade in the water. In the midground, a low bluff carries whitewashed apartment buildings with terracotta roofs and arched details, flanked by tall palm trees. In the foreground runs a wooden coastal boardwalk/fence with rope and patches of dry dune vegetation. The sea is calm, the sky clear, and the setting reads as an urban Mediterranean resort beach typical of Calahonda/Mijas Costa.

details.description: A sunny coastal scene along a sandy beach with a lively shoreline. In the foreground, a wooden railing and low dune grasses run parallel to the beach where people relax under colorful umbrellas and wade into the calm blue water. To the left, a row of white, multi-story residential buildings with red-tiled roofs lines the coast, separated from the beach by a promenade with tall palm trees. The ocean is a clear blue with small gentle waves and a bright, cloudless sky above. The overall setting resembles a resort area along the Calahonda coast in Málaga, Spain, near Cabopino, with a mix of beach life, palm-lined promenades, and seaside apartments.

details.description: Urban beachfront scene on a clear day: a wide sandy beach with sunbathers and colorful parasols, calm blue water marked by yellow buoy lines for swimmers, and a short timber/rock groyne or low pier in the mid‑distance. Lining the shore are multi‑story whitewashed apartment/hotel blocks with terracotta-tile roofs, arched balconies, and palm trees—typical Mediterranean/Andalusian resort architecture. In the foreground is a raised wooden boardwalk or dune-edge path with rope posts running parallel to the beach. The setting suggests a Mediterranean coastal resort, likely on Spain’s Costa del Sol.

A wooden boardwalk railing runs along the foreground on the right. Palm trees cluster near the hotel, which features white stucco walls, arches, and balconies. The turquoise sea extends to the horizon with small waves and a rocky outcrop visible offshore.

details.description: A sunny coastal scene captured on a bright day, showing a sandy beach meeting the blue ocean. The image is oriented vertically with the horizon running sideways (needs 90-degree clockwise rotation to be upright). Once oriented, the view looks east along the coastline with the Mediterranean Sea on the right and the shore on the left. The water is deep blue with small white-capped waves and a line of yellow marker buoys. The beach is sandy, populated by numerous people sunbathing under colorful umbrellas and walking near the water's edge. To the left (inland side), there is a large, multi-story white residential or hotel complex featuring traditional Andalusian architecture with terracotta tiled roofs, arched balconies, and palm trees. In the immediate foreground, parts of a wooden boardwalk structure (the Senda Litoral) and dry coastal vegetation are visible.

details.description: A bright, sunny daytime view of a Mediterranean beach scene, captured from an elevated wooden walkway. The image, oriented vertically, shows a sandy beach crowded with sunbathers and colorful umbrellas. To the left, a cluster of white-washed buildings with terracotta tile roofs and balconies sits atop a small rocky rise, interspersed with tall palm trees. The turquoise waters of the sea feature a line of yellow safety buoys. A wooden railing of a coastal path is visible in the immediate foreground. The sky is a clear, pale blue.

details.description: Sunny coastal scene showing a busy sandy beach with bathers, colorful umbrellas, and gentle waves. A line of yellow buoys marks the swimming area in the sea. To the right edge runs a raised wooden boardwalk or path with rope fencing over dry dune vegetation. Midground features low- to mid-rise white buildings with terracotta-tiled roofs and balconies typical of Mediterranean resort architecture, with several palm trees interspersed. Farther along the shore a small pier or rocky outcrop projects slightly into the water. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a warm summer day.

details.description: Bright sunny beach scene with pale sand along a calm blue-green sea. A group of people is gathered near the water's edge under colorful beach umbrellas. In the mid-ground a white Mediterranean-style building with arches sits behind the beach, flanked by tall palm trees. A wooden railing with vertical posts runs along the right foreground, suggesting a boardwalk or dune barrier. The sky fills the left portion of the frame with clear blue, and the overall composition presents the beach and resort area from a side angle, with the water on the right and the sky on the left.
